title: selinum kraussianum
intro: Selinum kraussianum, also known as kraussian carrot fern, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, Selinum kraussianum is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
